items.title: Create a structured parent-test evidence intake
items.success_signal: The user can record setup time, engagement, quotes, confusion, mess, changes, and repeatability in one concise structured workflow, with no invented observations.
items.baseline: The field-test pack had a free-form log, but no reusable intake with mechanical checks for required observation fields or real-session attestation.
items.hypothesis: A concise reusable form plus a standard-library validator will reduce missing parent-test evidence without encouraging invented observations.
items.expected_effect: Future real sessions can produce reviewable evidence for one of the five declared activities; no live content or tested-status claim changes from this operator action.
items.observation_window: Not started. Evaluate usability after the user submits the first real completed intake.
items.decision: Create intake and validation only; keep every activity untested until real evidence is separately reviewed.
items.result: Added a reusable parent-test evidence intake, a validator for required fields and status/attestation consistency, and a test-pack handoff. Independent review cycle 3 returned PASS after closing incomplete-evidence and template-mode bypasses. No observation, child quote, photo, engagement result, tested status, site file, or public claim was created.
items.notes: Do not mark an activity tested or change a live claim without real user evidence and separate content review.

items.title: Release the reviewed parent-test workflow and cloud measurement setup
items.success_signal: The reviewed local commit and GSC infrastructure are on origin/main, the Pages workflow behavior is verified, and no activity is falsely presented as tested.
items.baseline: KAL-OPS-001 is review-clean in local commit e44954a but not on origin/main; the repository has no unattended GSC workflow or secret.
items.hypothesis: Releasing the reviewed intake plus a fail-loud, read-only GSC workflow will make evidence collection reproducible without changing public tested-status claims.
items.expected_effect: The parent-test workflow becomes durable on origin/main, Pages stops redeploying for snapshot-only commits, and GSC collection becomes operational once the required GitHub secret and property access are configured.
items.observation_window: No content observation window. Verify repository, workflow, and release state immediately after push.
items.decision: Push the review-clean commits under the standing 2026-07-17 authorization and verify GitHub Actions. Never mark an activity tested without real validated evidence.
items.production_verification: GitHub Pages run 29627141434 succeeded for the reviewed workflow release, and the live homepage byte-matched the committed site. Pages run 29627796105 then succeeded for the exact GSC/Pages infrastructure commit 046d840. The released commits contain no site or tested-status claim change. GSC workflow run 29627800627 succeeded with the restricted service account and committed the first validated snapshot in a782f62; the later snapshot and roadmap-only commits did not trigger Pages.
items.result: The reviewed parent-test workflow and unattended GSC infrastructure are on origin/main. The first real snapshot collected 29 impressions for the finalized 28-day window, confirmed a successful 61-page sitemap, and found all 7 priority URLs indexed.
items.notes: The fresh GSC snapshot establishes the KAL-MON-001 baseline; wait for a changed validated snapshot before evidence review. No activity may be described as tested without real validated parent evidence.

items.title: Refresh search evidence for the pages Google is already testing
items.success_signal: A changed read-only snapshot identifies which existing page and query, if any, deserves the next bounded improvement.
items.notes: The first snapshot is the baseline, not changed evidence. Semrush is optional enrichment. Do not create new pages or request indexing merely because a scheduled check is due.

items.title: Improve one evidence-bearing age-4 STEM page
items.success_signal: One existing page becomes more useful and differentiated using real search or parent-test evidence, with generation and link validation green.
items.notes: Never manufacture parent observations, child quotes, photos, or tested status.
